tluaLocalMultiNameAnnotated.tlua(9,7): error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
tluaLocalMultiNameAnnotated.tlua(12,10): error TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'boolean'.
tluaLocalMultiNameAnnotated.tlua(15,29): error TS2322: Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'boolean'.


==== tluaLocalMultiNameAnnotated.tlua (3 errors) ====
    function pair(): (number, string)
      return 1, "a";
    end
    
    // Annotations check their positional value.
    local a: number, b: string = pair();
    
    // Position 0 mismatch.
    local c: string, d = pair();
          ~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
    
    // Position 1 mismatch.
    local e, f: boolean = pair();
             ~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'boolean'.
    
    // A name past the values must accept nil.
    local g: number, h: string, i: boolean = pair();
                                ~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'boolean'.
    
    // nil-accepting annotations are fine past the end.
    local j: number, k: string, l: boolean | nil = pair();
    
    // Mixed annotated and inferred names.
    local m, n: string = pair();
